revision.text:
[[File:Map-okinawa-pref.png|upright=1.5|alt=A map of Okinawa Prefecture|thumb|[[Okinawa Prefecture]], including the [[Okinawa Islands]] and [[Okinawa Island]]]] {{Nihongo|'''Okinawa'''|沖縄|Okinawa|lead=yes}} most commonly refers to: * [[Okinawa Prefecture]], Japan's southernmost prefecture * [[Okinawa Island]], the most populous island of Okinawa Prefecture * [[Okinawa Islands]], an island group including Okinawa itself * [[Okinawa (city)]], the second largest city in the prefecture
It may also refer to: * [[Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * [[Ryukyu (disambiguation)]] * [[Names of Okinawa]] * [[USS Okinawa]]
{{disambiguation|geo}}

It may also refer to: * [[Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason

It may also refer to: * [[Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason

It may also refer to: * [[Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * [[Ryukyu (disambiguation)]] * [[Names of Okinawa]] * [[USS Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]]
{{disambiguation|geo}}

It may also refer to: * [[:en:Battle of Okinawa|Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[:en:Naval Base Okinawa|Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[:en:Okinawa Autotech|Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[:en:Okinawa Trough|Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[:en:Okinawa Uno|Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[:en:Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[:en:Okinawan (disambiguation)|Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Ryukyu (disambiguation)|Ryukyu (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Names of Okinawa|Names of Okinawa]] * [[:en:USS Okinawa|USS Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]]

It may also refer to: * [[:en:Battle of Okinawa|Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[:en:Naval Base Okinawa|Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[:en:Okinawa Autotech|Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[:en:Okinawa Trough|Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[:en:Okinawa Uno|Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[:en:Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason

{{Nihongo|'''Okinawa'''|沖縄|Okinawa|lead=yes}} most commonly refers to: * [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa Prefecture]], Japan's southernmost prefecture * [[:en:Okinawa Island|Okinawa Island]], the most populous island of Okinawa Prefecture * [[:en:Okinawa Islands|Okinawa Islands]], an island group including Okinawa itself * [[:en:Okinawa (city)|Okinawa (city)]], the second largest city in the prefecture
It may also refer to: * [[:en:Battle of Okinawa|Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[:en:Naval Base Okinawa|Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[:en:Okinawa Autotech|Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[:en:Okinawa Trough|Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[:en:Okinawa Uno|Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[:en:Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[:en:Okinawan (disambiguation)|Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Ryukyu (disambiguation)|Ryukyu (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Names of Okinawa|Names of Okinawa]] * [[:en:USS Okinawa|USS Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]]

It may also refer to: * [[:en:Battle of Okinawa|Battle of Okinawa]], a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * [[:en:Naval Base Okinawa|Naval Base Okinawa]], United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * [[:en:Okinawa Autotech|Okinawa Autotech]], an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * [[:en:Okinawa Trough|Okinawa Trough]], a geologic basin in the West Pacific * [[:en:Okinawa Uno|Okinawa Uno]], a city and municipality in Bolivia * [[:en:Okinawa (film)|''Okinawa'' (film)]], a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[:en:Okinawan (disambiguation)|Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Ryukyu (disambiguation)|Ryukyu (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Names of Okinawa|Names of Okinawa]] * [[:en:USS Okinawa|USS Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]]

[[File:Map-okinawa-pref.png|upright=1.5|alt=A map of Okinawa Prefecture|thumb|{{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture|1=Okinawa Prefecture}}, including the {{ill|Okinawa Islands|en|Okinawa Islands|WD=Q697589|lt=Okinawa Islands|1=Okinawa Islands}} and {{ill|Okinawa Island|en|Okinawa Island|WD=Q600614|lt=Okinawa Island|1=Okinawa Island}}]] {{Nihongo|'''Okinawa'''|沖縄|Okinawa|lead=yes}} most commonly refers to: * {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|WD=Q766445|lt=Okinawa Prefecture|1=Okinawa Prefecture}}, Japan's southernmost prefecture * {{ill|Okinawa Island|en|Okinawa Island|WD=Q600614|lt=Okinawa Island|1=Okinawa Island}}, the most populous island of Okinawa Prefecture * {{ill|Okinawa Islands|en|Okinawa Islands|WD=Q697589|lt=Okinawa Islands|1=Okinawa Islands}}, an island group including Okinawa itself * {{ill|Okinawa (city)|en|Okinawa (city)|WD=Q328615|lt=Okinawa (city)|1=Okinawa (city)}}, the second largest city in the prefecture
It may also refer to: * {{ill|Battle of Okinawa|en|Battle of Okinawa|WD=Q192660|lt=Battle of Okinawa|1=Battle of Okinawa}}, a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * {{ill|Naval Base Okinawa|en|Naval Base Okinawa|WD=Q113758420|lt=Naval Base Okinawa|1=Naval Base Okinawa}}, United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * {{ill|Okinawa Autotech|en|Okinawa Autotech|WD=Q115862314|lt=Okinawa Autotech|1=Okinawa Autotech}}, an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * {{ill|Okinawa Trough|en|Okinawa Trough|WD=Q772424|lt=Okinawa Trough|1=Okinawa Trough}}, a geologic basin in the West Pacific * {{ill|Okinawa Uno|en|Okinawa Uno|WD=Q1319313|lt=Okinawa Uno|1=Okinawa Uno}}, a city and municipality in Bolivia * {{ill|Okinawa (film)|en|Okinawa (film)|WD=Q25136572|lt=''Okinawa'' (film)|1=Okinawa (film)}}, a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[:en:Okinawan (disambiguation)|Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * {{ill|Ryukyu (disambiguation)|en|Ryukyu (disambiguation)|WD=Q27996|lt=Ryukyu (disambiguation)|1=Ryukyu (disambiguation)}} * {{ill|Names of Okinawa|en|Names of Okinawa|WD=Q17075805|lt=Names of Okinawa|1=Names of Okinawa}} * {{ill|USS Okinawa|en|USS Okinawa|WD=Q2470543|lt=USS Okinawa|1=USS Okinawa}} * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]]

It may also refer to: * {{ill|Battle of Okinawa|en|Battle of Okinawa|WD=Q192660|lt=Battle of Okinawa|1=Battle of Okinawa}}, a major battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, fought between the United States and Japan * {{ill|Naval Base Okinawa|en|Naval Base Okinawa|WD=Q113758420|lt=Naval Base Okinawa|1=Naval Base Okinawa}}, United States facilities on Okinawa Island, Japan * {{ill|Okinawa Autotech|en|Okinawa Autotech|WD=Q115862314|lt=Okinawa Autotech|1=Okinawa Autotech}}, an Indian electric scooter manufacturer * {{ill|Okinawa Trough|en|Okinawa Trough|WD=Q772424|lt=Okinawa Trough|1=Okinawa Trough}}, a geologic basin in the West Pacific * {{ill|Okinawa Uno|en|Okinawa Uno|WD=Q1319313|lt=Okinawa Uno|1=Okinawa Uno}}, a city and municipality in Bolivia * {{ill|Okinawa (film)|en|Okinawa (film)|WD=Q25136572|lt=''Okinawa'' (film)|1=Okinawa (film)}}, a 1952 American war film by Leigh Jason
== See also == * [[:en:Okinawan (disambiguation)|Okinawan (disambiguation)]] * {{ill|Ryukyu (disambiguation)|en|Ryukyu (disambiguation)|WD=Q27996|lt=Ryukyu (disambiguation)|1=Ryukyu (disambiguation)}} * {{ill|Names of Okinawa|en|Names of Okinawa|WD=Q17075805|lt=Names of Okinawa|1=Names of Okinawa}} * {{ill|USS Okinawa|en|USS Okinawa|WD=Q2470543|lt=USS Okinawa|1=USS Okinawa}} * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]]
